Navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

Buttons.primary: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-full transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-green-900/20
Buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-600 py-3 px-6 rounded-full transition-all

Cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 p-8 rounded-2xl hover:border-green-500/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
Cards.pricing: flex flex-col h-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-8 rounded-3xl hover:border-green-500 transition-all hover:-translate-y-2
Cards.testimonial: bg-zinc-900/30 border border-zinc-800/50 p-6 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm

Inputs.style: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-green-500 focus:ring-green-500/20 h-12 rounded-lg

motion.entrance: opacity-0 translate-y-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700 fill-mode-forwards

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the theme with colors: { background: '#0f0f0f', primary: '#22c55e' }. Add 'Oswald' to fontFamily.
2. INDEX.CSS: Add the @import for fonts at the top. Set body background to #0f0f0f and text to #fafafa.
3. LANDING PAGE: Use a 'Hero' component with the hero_bg image as a background with a heavy dark overlay (opacity 70-80%). Center the text.
4. PRICING: Create 3 cards ($19, $39, $59). Highlight the $39 card with a green border or glow.
5. AUTH: Keep register/login pages simple. Centered card on a dark background. Use the specified Input styles.
6. ICONS: Use Lucide-React icons (Dumbbell, Users, Trophy, Check, etc.) with text-green-500 class.
7. TESTIMONIALS: Use the provided testimonial images as avatars in the cards.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all green text on dark backgrounds meets contrast ratios. If #22c55e is too light for text, use a slightly lighter shade or white text with green icons.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors or subtle noise textures.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.
Never use pure black (#000000), use #0f0f0f or #18181b.
Use 'text-balance' for headlines to prevent orphans.
